records.question: Name schools in Riverside which the average of average math score for SAT is grater than 400, what is the funding type of these schools?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.sname, T2.`Charter Funding Type` FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.`District Name` LIKE 'Riverside%' GROUP BY T1.sname, T2.`Charter Funding Type` HAVING CAST(SUM(T1.AvgScrMath) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.cds) > 400
records.baseline_pred: SELECT s.FundingType FROM schools AS s JOIN satscores AS t ON s.CDSCode = t.cds WHERE s.City = 'Riverside' AND t.AvgScrMath > 400 GROUP BY s.FundingType HAVING AVG(t.AvgScrMath) > 400
records.alt_pred: SELECT T1.FundingType FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T1.County = 'Riverside' AND T2.rtype = 'S' GROUP BY T1.FundingType HAVING AVG(T2.AvgScrMath) > 400

records.question: What is the complete address of the school with the lowest excellence rate? Indicate the Street, City, Zip and State.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Street, T2.City, T2.State, T2.Zip FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY CAST(T1.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / T1.NumTstTakr ASC LIMIT 1
records.baseline_pred: SELECT Street, City, Zip, State FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (SELECT cds FROM satscores WHERE NumTstTakr > 0 ORDER BY (NumGE1500 * 1.0 / NumTstTakr) ASC LIMIT 1)
records.alt_pred: SELECT T1.Street, T1.City, T1.Zip, T1.State FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T2.NumTstTakr > 0 ORDER BY (T2.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / T2.NumTstTakr) ASC LIMIT 1

records.question: Which schools served a grade span of Kindergarten to 9th grade in the county of Los Angeles and what is its Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.School, T1.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` * 100 / T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.County = 'Los Angeles' AND T2.GSserved = 'K-9'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT f.`School Name`, (f.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` / f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) * 100 AS `Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)` FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE f.`County Name` = 'Los Angeles' AND f.`Low Grade` = 'K' AND f.`High Grade` = '9'
records.alt_pred: SELECT frpm."School Name", (frpm."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" / frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") * 100 AS "Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm WHERE frpm."County Name" = 'Los Angeles' AND frpm."Low Grade" = 'K' AND frpm."High Grade" = '9'

records.question: For loans contracts which are still running where client are in debt, list the district of the and the state the percentage unemployment rate increment from year 1995 to 1996.
records.gold_sql: SELECT CAST((T3.A13 - T3.A12) AS REAL) * 100 / T3.A12 FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T1.status = 'D'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT district.A2, CAST((district.A13 - district.A12) * 100.0 / district.A12 AS REAL) FROM loan JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id JOIN client ON account.district_id = client.district_id JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id WHERE loan.status = 'D'
records.alt_pred: SELECT d.A2 AS district, d.A3 AS state, ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increment_percentage FROM loan l JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN disp dsp ON a.account_id = dsp.account_id JOIN client c ON dsp.client_id = c.client_id JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id WHERE l.status = 'D' AND d.A12 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.district_id

records.question: How often does account number 3 request an account statement to be released? What was the aim of debiting 3539 in total?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.frequency, T2.k_symbol FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN (SELECT account_id, k_symbol, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM `order` GROUP BY account_id, k_symbol) AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.account_id = 3 AND T2.total_amount = 3539
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(*) AS frequency, k_symbol AS purpose FROM trans WHERE account_id = 3 AND type = 'VYDAJ' AND k_symbol = 'SLUZBY' GROUP BY k_symbol
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trans WHERE account_id = 3 AND k_symbol = 'STATEMENT'

records.question: What elements are in a double type bond?
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN connected AS T3 ON T1.atom_id = T3.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_type = '='
records.baseline_pred: SELECT DISTINCT a.element FROM atom a JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '='
records.alt_pred: SELECT DISTINCT a.element FROM atom AS a JOIN connected AS c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '='

records.question: What is the percentage of carcinogenic molecules in triple type bonds?
records.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN T2.molecule_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '#'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = '#' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(b.bond_id) FROM bond b INNER JOIN atom a ON b.molecule_id = a.molecule_id INNER JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '+'
records.alt_pred: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM molecule AS T1 JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.bond_type = '#'

records.question: Name the card and artist with the most ruling information. Also state if the card is a promotional printing.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.name, T1.artist, T1.isPromo FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN rulings AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.isPromo = 1 AND T1.artist = (SELECT artist FROM cards WHERE isPromo = 1 GROUP BY artist HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT uuid) = (SELECT MAX(count_uuid) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT uuid) AS count_uuid FROM cards WHERE isPromo = 1 GROUP BY artist ))) LIMIT 1
records.baseline_pred: SELECT c.name, c.artist, c.isPromo FROM cards AS c JOIN rulings AS r ON c.uuid = r.uuid GROUP BY c.uuid ORDER BY COUNT(r.id) DESC LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT c.name, c.artist, c.isPromo FROM cards AS c JOIN rulings AS r ON c.uuid = r.uuid GROUP BY c.uuid ORDER BY COUNT(r.id) DESC LIMIT 1

records.question: Calculate the percentage of the cards availabe in Chinese Simplified.
records.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid
records.baseline_pred: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT cards.uuid) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT uuid) FROM cards) FROM cards JOIN foreign_data ON cards.uuid = foreign_data.uuid WHERE foreign_data.language = 'Chinese Simplified'
records.alt_pred: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT T1.uuid) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT uuid) FROM cards) FROM foreign_data AS T1 WHERE T1.language = 'Chinese Simplified'

records.question: What is the border color of card "Ancestor's Chosen"?
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT borderColor FROM cards WHERE name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT borderColor FROM cards WHERE name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
records.alt_pred: SELECT borderColor FROM cards WHERE name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'

records.question: What is the rule of playing card "Benalish Knight"?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.format FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.name = 'Benalish Knight'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT text FROM rulings WHERE uuid IN (SELECT uuid FROM cards WHERE name LIKE '%Benalish Knight%')
records.alt_pred: SELECT T1.text FROM rulings AS T1 INNER JOIN cards AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.name LIKE '%Benalish Knight%'

records.question: Lists all types of cards in German.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.subtypes, T1.supertypes FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.language = 'German' AND T1.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND T1.supertypes IS NOT NULL
records.baseline_pred: SELECT DISTINCT T1.subtypes, T1.supertypes FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.language = 'German' AND T1.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND T1.supertypes IS NOT NULL
records.alt_pred: SELECT DISTINCT T1.subtypes, T1.supertypes FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.language = 'German' AND T1.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND T1.supertypes IS NOT NULL

records.question: How many unknown power cards contain info about the triggered ability
records.gold_sql: SELECT Count(DISTINCT T1.id) FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN rulings AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE (T1.power IS NULL OR T1.power = '*') AND T2.text LIKE '%triggered ability%'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE (power IS NULL OR power = '*') AND text LIKE '%triggered ability%'
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards WHERE (power IS NULL OR power = '*') AND text LIKE '%triggered ability%'

records.question: Please list the Italian names of the cards in the set Coldsnap with the highest converted mana cost.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM foreign_data AS T1 INNER JOIN cards AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid INNER JOIN sets AS T3 ON T3.code = T2.setCode WHERE T3.name = 'Coldsnap' AND T1.language = 'Italian' ORDER BY T2.convertedManaCost DESC
records.baseline_pred: SELECT fd.name FROM cards AS c JOIN foreign_data AS fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid JOIN sets AS s ON c.setCode = s.code WHERE s.name = 'Coldsnap' AND fd.language = 'Italian' ORDER BY c.convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT T2.name FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN cards AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T3 ON T2.uuid = T3.uuid WHERE T1.name = 'Coldsnap' AND T3.language = 'Italian' ORDER BY T2.convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1

records.question: Which of the play format has the highest number of banned status? Indicate the play format and the names of all the card meet the condition.
records.gold_sql: WITH MaxBanned AS (SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS count_banned FROM legalities WHERE status = 'Banned' GROUP BY format ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT T2.format, T1.name FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid INNER JOIN MaxBanned MB ON MB.format = T2.format WHERE T2.status = 'Banned'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT l.format, c.name FROM legalities l JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid WHERE l.status = 'Banned' GROUP BY l.format ORDER BY COUNT(l.status) DESC LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT l.format, c.name FROM legalities AS l INNER JOIN cards AS c ON l.uuid = c.uuid WHERE l.status = 'Banned' GROUP BY l.format ORDER BY COUNT(l.status) DESC LIMIT 1

records.question: For the user No.24, how many times is the number of his/her posts compared to his/her votes?
records.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT T2.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Id) FROM votes AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.UserId = 24
records.baseline_pred: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT p.Id) AS REAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT v.Id), 0) AS post_to_vote_ratio FROM posts p LEFT JOIN votes v ON p.Id = v.PostId WHERE p.OwnerUserId = 24
records.alt_pred: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT p.Id) AS REAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT v.Id), 0) AS post_vote_ratio FROM posts p LEFT JOIN votes v ON p.Id = v.PostId WHERE p.OwnerUserId = 24

records.question: Write all the comments left by users who edited the post titled 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Comment FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT comments.Text FROM comments JOIN posts ON comments.PostId = posts.Id WHERE posts.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
records.alt_pred: SELECT comments.Text FROM comments JOIN posts ON comments.PostId = posts.Id WHERE posts.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'

records.question: Which user have only one post history per post and having at least 1000 views?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.UserId FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.PostId = T3.Id WHERE T3.ViewCount >= 1000 GROUP BY T2.UserId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.PostHistoryTypeId) = 1
records.baseline_pred: SELECT DISTINCT ph.UserId FROM postHistory ph JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id WHERE p.ViewCount >= 1000 AND ph.UserId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ph.UserId, ph.PostId HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT DISTINCT ph.UserId FROM postHistory ph JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id WHERE p.ViewCount >= 1000 AND ph.PostId IN (SELECT PostId FROM postHistory GROUP BY PostId HAVING COUNT(*) = 1)

records.question: Among the users located in United Kingdom, how many users whose post have a total favorite amount of 4 or more?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.Location = 'United Kingdom' AND T2.FavoriteCount >= 4
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.Id) FROM users u JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId WHERE u.Location = 'United Kingdom' AND p.FavoriteCount >= 4
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.Location = 'United Kingdom' AND T2.FavoriteCount >= 4

records.question: Provide the text of the latest 10 comments to the post with the title 'Analysing wind data with R' and the display name of the user who left it.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T3.Text, T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId INNER JOIN comments AS T3 ON T2.Id = T3.PostId WHERE T2.Title = 'Analysing wind data with R' ORDER BY T1.CreationDate DESC LIMIT 10
records.baseline_pred: SELECT comments.Text, comments.UserDisplayName FROM comments JOIN posts ON comments.PostId = posts.Id WHERE posts.Title = 'Analysing wind data with R' ORDER BY comments.CreationDate DESC LIMIT 10
records.alt_pred: SELECT comments.Text, comments.UserDisplayName FROM comments JOIN posts ON comments.PostId = posts.Id WHERE posts.Title = 'Analysing wind data with R' ORDER BY comments.CreationDate DESC LIMIT 10

records.question: What is the percentage of superheroes who act in their own self-interest or make decisions based on their own moral code? Indicate how many of the said superheroes were published by Marvel Comics.
records.gold_sql: SELECT (CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero)), CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN alignment AS T3 ON T3.id = T1.alignment_id WHERE T3.alignment = 'Bad'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(s.id) AS percentage, SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM superhero s INNER JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id LEFT JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
records.alt_pred: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(superhero.id) AS percentage, SUM(CASE WHEN alignment.alignment = 'Bad' AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_count FROM superhero LEFT JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id LEFT JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id

records.question: Who was the player that got the lap time of 0:01:27 in the race No. 161? Show his introduction website.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.forename, T2.surname, T2.url FROM lapTimes AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 161 AND T1.time LIKE '1:27%'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT drivers.url FROM lapTimes JOIN drivers ON lapTimes.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE lapTimes.raceId = 161 AND lapTimes.time LIKE '1:27%'
records.alt_pred: SELECT drivers.url FROM drivers JOIN lapTimes ON drivers.driverId = lapTimes.driverId WHERE lapTimes.raceId = 161 AND lapTimes.time LIKE '1:27%'

records.question: What is the best lap time recorded? List the driver and race with such recorded lap time.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.milliseconds, T1.forename, T1.surname, T3.name FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId ORDER BY T2.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1
records.baseline_pred: SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname, races.name FROM lapTimes JOIN drivers ON lapTimes.driverId = drivers.driverId JOIN races ON lapTimes.raceId = races.raceId WHERE lapTimes.milliseconds = (SELECT MIN(milliseconds) FROM lapTimes) LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname, races.name FROM lapTimes JOIN drivers ON lapTimes.driverId = drivers.driverId JOIN races ON lapTimes.raceId = races.raceId ORDER BY lapTimes.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1

records.question: Calculate the percentage whereby Hamilton was not at the 1st track of the the f1 circuit since 2010.
records.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.position <> 1 THEN T2.position END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.driverStandingsId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T1.year >= 2010
records.baseline_pred: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.positionOrder > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) FROM results r INNER JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId INNER JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND ra.year >= 2010
records.alt_pred: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN position > 1 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM results JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId WHERE surname = 'Hamilton' AND year >= 2010

records.question: Which race was Alex Yoong in when he was in track number less than 20?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.name FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Alex' AND T3.surname = 'Yoong' AND T2.position < 20
records.baseline_pred: SELECT races.name FROM races JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE drivers.forename = 'Alex' AND drivers.surname = 'Yoong' AND results.position < 20
records.alt_pred: SELECT races.name FROM races JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE drivers.forename = 'Alex' AND drivers.surname = 'Yoong' AND results.position < 20

records.question: In which Formula_1 race did Lewis Hamilton rank the highest?
records.gold_sql: SELECT name FROM races WHERE raceId IN ( SELECT raceId FROM results WHERE rank = 1 AND driverId = ( SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton' ) )
records.baseline_pred: SELECT races.name FROM races JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis' AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' ORDER BY results.rank ASC LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT races.name FROM races JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis' AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' ORDER BY results.rank ASC LIMIT 1

records.question: List down top 3 German drivers who has the shortest average pit stop duration and were born between 1980-1985.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname FROM pitStops AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.nationality = 'German' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.dob) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1985' GROUP BY T2.forename, T2.surname ORDER BY AVG(T1.duration) LIMIT 3
records.baseline_pred: SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name FROM pitStops p JOIN drivers d ON p.driverId = d.driverId WHERE strftime('%Y', d.dob) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1985' AND d.nationality = 'German' GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname ORDER BY AVG(p.milliseconds) ASC LIMIT 3
records.alt_pred: SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname FROM drivers JOIN pitStops ON drivers.driverId = pitStops.driverId WHERE drivers.nationality = 'German' AND strftime('%Y', drivers.dob) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1985' GROUP BY drivers.driverId ORDER BY AVG(pitStops.milliseconds) ASC LIMIT 3

records.question: What is the constructor reference name of the champion in the 2009 Singapore Grand Prix? Please give its website.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T3.constructorRef, T3.url FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN constructors AS T3 on T1.constructorId = T3.constructorId WHERE T2.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2009 AND T1.time LIKE '_:%:__.___'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT constructors.constructorRef, constructors.url FROM results INNER JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId INNER JOIN constructors ON results.constructorId = constructors.constructorId WHERE races.year = 2009 AND races.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND results.positionOrder = 1 ORDER BY results.time DESC LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT T1.constructorRef, T1.url FROM constructors AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T3.year = 2009 AND T3.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' AND T2.positionOrder = 1

records.question: What are the speed in which attacks are put together of the top 4 teams with the highest build Up Play Speed?
records.gold_sql: SELECT t1.buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id ORDER BY t1.buildUpPlaySpeed ASC LIMIT 4
records.baseline_pred: SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team_Attributes ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC LIMIT 4
records.alt_pred: SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed FROM Team_Attributes ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC LIMIT 4

records.question: List the long name of teams with above-average build-up play passing in 2012.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t4.team_long_name FROM Team_Attributes AS t3 INNER JOIN Team AS t4 ON t3.team_api_id = t4.team_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t3.`date`, 1, 4) = '2012' AND t3.buildUpPlayPassing > ( SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.buildUpPlayPassing) AS REAL) / COUNT(t1.id) FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y',t2.`date`) = '2012')
records.baseline_pred: SELECT T1.team_long_name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '2012' AND T2.buildUpPlayPassing > (SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing) FROM Team_Attributes WHERE buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL AND strftime('%Y', date) = '2012')
records.alt_pred: SELECT T1.team_long_name FROM Team AS T1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.team_api_id WHERE T2.buildUpPlayPassing > (SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing) FROM Team_Attributes WHERE buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL AND strftime('%Y', date) = '2012') AND strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '2012'

records.question: How much higher in percentage is Ariel Borysiuk's overall rating than that of Paulin Puel?
records.gold_sql: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 - SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id
records.baseline_pred: SELECT CAST((MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN pa.overall_rating END) - MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN pa.overall_rating END)) * 100.0 / MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN pa.overall_rating END) AS REAL) AS percentage_higher FROM Player p INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.player_name IN ('Ariel Borysiuk', 'Paulin Puel') AND pa.overall_rating IS NOT NULL
records.alt_pred: SELECT CAST((MAX(CASE WHEN player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN overall_rating ELSE NULL END) - MAX(CASE WHEN player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN overall_rating ELSE NULL END)) AS REAL) * 100 / MAX(CASE WHEN player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN overall_rating ELSE NULL END) FROM Player JOIN Player_Attributes ON Player.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id

records.question: Please state the finishing rate and curve score of the player who has the heaviest weight.
records.gold_sql: SELECT id, finishing, curve FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = ( SELECT player_api_id FROM Player ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 1 ) LIMIT 1
records.baseline_pred: SELECT finishing, curve FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.weight = (SELECT MAX(weight) FROM Player)
records.alt_pred: SELECT finishing, curve FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.weight = (SELECT MAX(weight) FROM Player) LIMIT 1

records.question: The oldest SJS patient's medical laboratory work was completed on what date, and what age was the patient when they initially arrived at the hospital?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Date, STRFTIME('%Y', T2.`First Date`) - STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Birthday),T2.Birthday FROM Laboratory AS T1 INNER JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.Diagnosis = 'SJS' AND T2.Birthday IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.Birthday ASC LIMIT 1
records.baseline_pred: SELECT L.Date, (strftime('%Y', P."First Date") - strftime('%Y', P.Birthday)) FROM Patient P INNER JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID WHERE P.Diagnosis = 'SJS' AND P.Birthday = (SELECT MIN(Birthday) FROM Patient WHERE Diagnosis = 'SJS') ORDER BY L.Date ASC LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT Laboratory.Date, (strftime('%Y', Patient.First Date) - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday)) AS InitialAge FROM Patient JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID WHERE Examination.Diagnosis = 'SJS' ORDER BY Patient.Birthday DESC LIMIT 1

records.question: Was the patient with the number 57266's uric acid within a normal range?
records.gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.UA > 6.5) OR (T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.UA > 8.0) THEN true ELSE false END FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = 57266
records.baseline_pred: SELECT CASE WHEN (T1.UA > 8.0 AND T2.SEX = 'M') OR (T1.UA > 6.5 AND T2.SEX = 'F') THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_normal FROM Laboratory AS T1 INNER JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = 57266 LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT CASE WHEN (T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.UA > 8.0) OR (T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.UA > 6.5) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS UA_Within_Normal_Range FROM Patient AS T1 JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = 57266

records.question: Provide ID, sex and age of patient who has blood glucose (GLU) not within normal range but with total cholesterol(T-CHO) within normal range.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX , STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GLU >= 180 AND T2.`T-CHO` < 250
records.baseline_pred: SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX, (strftime('%Y', date('now')) - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) AS age FROM Patient p INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID WHERE l.GLU >= 180 AND l.T-CHO < 250
records.alt_pred: SELECT P.ID, P.SEX, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', P.Birthday) AS age FROM Patient P JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID WHERE L.GLU >= 180 AND L.`T-CHO` < 250

records.question: What are the patient's diagnosis for those who has lower red blood blood cell? State their ID and age.
records.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Diagnosis, T1.ID , STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) -STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.RBC < 3.5
records.baseline_pred: SELECT P.ID, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', P.Birthday)) AS age, P.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS P JOIN Laboratory AS L ON P.ID = L.ID WHERE L.RBC < 3.5
records.alt_pred: SELECT P.ID, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', P.Birthday)) AS age, E.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS P JOIN Examination AS E ON P.ID = E.ID JOIN Laboratory AS L ON P.ID = L.ID WHERE L.RBC < 3.5

records.question: Among the male patients who have a normal level of white blood cells, how many of them have an abnormal fibrinogen level?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.FG <= 150 OR T2.FG >= 450 AND T2.WBC > 3.5 AND T2.WBC < 9.0 AND T1.SEX = 'M'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT L.ID) FROM Patient P INNER JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID WHERE P.SEX = 'M' AND L.WBC > 3.5 AND L.WBC < 9.0 AND (L.FG <= 150 OR L.FG >= 450)
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.WBC > 3.5 AND T2.WBC < 9.0 AND (T2.FG <= 150 OR T2.FG >= 450)

records.question: How many patients with an Ig G higher than normal?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T3.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGG >= 2000
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ID) FROM Laboratory WHERE IGG >= 2000
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGG >= 2000

records.question: How many patients with a normal Ig A level came to the hospital after 1990/1/1?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGA BETWEEN 80 AND 500 AND  strftime('%Y',  T1.`First Date`) > '1990'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT P.ID) FROM Patient P JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID WHERE L.IGA > 80 AND L.IGA < 500 AND P.`First Date` >= '1990-01-01'
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGA > 80 AND T2.IGA < 500 AND T1.`First Date` >= '1990-01-01'

records.question: Among the patients who has a normal level of anti-centromere and a normal level of anti-SSB, how many of them are male?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.CENTROMEA IN ('negative', '0') AND T2.SSB IN ('negative', '0') AND T1.SEX = 'M'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT P.ID) FROM Patient P JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID WHERE E.CENTROMEA IN ('-', '+-') AND E.SSB IN ('-', '+-') AND P.SEX = 'M'
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT P.ID) FROM Patient P JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID WHERE L.CENTROMEA IN ('-', '+-') AND L.SSB IN ('-', '+-') AND P.SEX = 'M'

records.question: Did Maya Mclean attend the 'Women's Soccer' event?
records.gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN T3.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' THEN 'YES' END AS result FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member INNER JOIN event AS T3 ON T2.link_to_event = T3.event_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Maya' AND T1.last_name = 'Mclean'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 AS attended FROM attendance AS a JOIN member AS m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id JOIN event AS e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance AS a JOIN member AS m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id JOIN event AS e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'

records.question: Identify the type of expenses and their total value approved for 'October Meeting' event.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T1.type, SUM(T3.cost) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT expense.expense_description AS type, SUM(expense.cost) AS total_value FROM expense JOIN budget ON expense.link_to_budget = budget.budget_id JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND expense.approved = 'true' GROUP BY expense.expense_description
records.alt_pred: SELECT expense.expense_description, SUM(expense.cost) AS total_value FROM expense JOIN budget ON expense.link_to_budget = budget.budget_id JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND expense.approved = 'true' GROUP BY expense.expense_description

records.question: Please list the product description of the products consumed in September, 2013.
records.gold_sql: SELECT T3.Description FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID INNER JOIN products AS T3 ON T1.ProductID = T3.ProductID WHERE T2.Date = '201309'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT DISTINCT p.Description FROM yearmonth ym JOIN transactions_1k t ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE ym.Date = '201309'
records.alt_pred: SELECT p.Description FROM products AS p JOIN transactions_1k AS t ON p.ProductID = t.ProductID JOIN yearmonth AS y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID WHERE y.Date = '201309'

records.question: What is the percentage of the customers who used EUR in 2012/8/25?
records.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Currency = 'EUR', 1, 0)) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-25'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT t.CustomerID) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers) FROM transactions_1k t JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25' AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
records.alt_pred: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT t.CustomerID) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) FROM customers) FROM transactions_1k t JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-25' AND c.Currency = 'EUR'

records.question: What is the amount spent by customer "38508" at the gas stations? How much had the customer spent in January 2012?
records.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(T1.Price ) , SUM(IIF(T3.Date = '201201', T1.Price, 0)) FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID WHERE T1.CustomerID = '38508'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT SUM(Amount) AS TotalSpent FROM transactions_1k WHERE CustomerID = 38508 AND GasStationID IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalSpent FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 38508 AND Date = '201201'
records.alt_pred: SELECT SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalSpent, SUM(CASE WHEN t.Date = '201201' THEN t.Amount ELSE 0 END) AS January2012Spent FROM transactions_1k AS t WHERE t.CustomerID = 38508

records.question: Who is the top spending customer and how much is the average price per single item purchased by this customer? What currency was being used?
records.gold_sql: SELECT T2.CustomerID, SUM(T2.Price / T2.Amount), T1.Currency FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.CustomerID = ( SELECT CustomerID FROM yearmonth ORDER BY Consumption DESC LIMIT 1 ) GROUP BY T2.CustomerID, T1.Currency
records.baseline_pred: SELECT customers.CustomerID, SUM(transactions_1k.Price) / SUM(transactions_1k.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item, customers.Currency FROM transactions_1k JOIN customers ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID GROUP BY transactions_1k.CustomerID, customers.Currency ORDER BY SUM(transactions_1k.Price) DESC LIMIT 1
records.alt_pred: SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Currency, SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item FROM customers c JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Currency ORDER BY SUM(t.Price) DESC LIMIT 1
